summary: Iteration 80: Complete testing of per-program pricing feature with price_per_unit and offer_price. source_tier successfully removed. Currency switcher, auto-calculated Total and Discount columns, Package Total row all working. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified.

details: 5/5 currency pills present: INR, USD, AED, EUR, GBP
Currency pills styled as small rounded buttons in row above table
Clicking USD switches all column headers to show (USD)
Clicking INR switches all column headers to show (INR)
Selected currency pill highlighted with purple background
Column headers: PROGRAM | DUR. | UNIT | PER UNIT (CUR) | TOTAL (CUR) | OFFER (CUR) | DISC %
source_tier column correctly REMOVED
Unit column shows 'mo' for months, 'ses' for sessions
Per Unit column shows editable input field
Total column shows auto-calculated value (per_unit × duration)
Offer column shows editable input field
Disc % column shows auto-calculated percentage with green color when > 0
AWRP (12 months): INR 90,000/unit → 1,080,000 total | 540,000 offer | 50%
Money Magic Multiplier (6 months): INR 20,000/unit → 120,000 total | 60,000 offer | 50%
Bi-Annual Downloads (2 sessions): 0 per unit | 0 total | 0 offer | -
Quarterly Meetups (4 sessions): 0 per unit | 0 total | 0 offer | -
Package Total row exists at bottom of table
Shows currency in label: 'Package Total (INR)' or 'Package Total (USD)'
INR view: Total=1,200,000 | Offer=600,000 | Disc=50%
USD view: Total=23,550 | Offer=11,775 | Disc=50%
Total is sum of all program totals
Offer is sum of all program offers
Disc % is overall discount percentage
Total = price_per_unit × duration_value (auto-calculated)
Discount % = (total - offer) / total × 100 (auto-calculated)
Package Total sums all program totals
Package Offer sums all program offers
Overall discount calculated from package totals
Auto-filled from package config indicator present (green checkmark)
Annual Program auto-filled: 'Annual Healing Package'
Total Fee auto-filled: 50000 (INR)
Bi-Annual DL: 2, Quarterly Rel: 4 (from config)
Sessions Current: 12, Total: 12 (from config)
Programs in Package: AWRP, Money Magic Multiplier, Bi-Annual Downloads, Quarterly Meetups
Admin Programs tab accessible
Admin Sessions tab accessible
Admin Enrollments tab accessible
Student home API returns data (200 OK)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing pricing config. Updated via PUT to set: AWRP (90000 INR/unit, 540000 offer), MMM (20000 INR/unit, 60000 offer)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 tested the per-program pricing feature. Key changes: 1) source_tier removed from programs table. 2) Added price_per_unit and offer_price dicts per program per currency. 3) Total column auto-calculates (per_unit × duration). 4) Discount % auto-calculates ((total-offer)/total×100). 5) Currency switcher (INR/USD/AED/EUR/GBP) changes displayed currency in table headers. 6) Package Total row at bottom sums all programs. Current pricing: AWRP (12m, 90000 INR/unit, 540000 offer, 50% disc), MMM (6m, 20000 INR/unit, 60000 offer, 50% disc), Bi-Annual Downloads (2 sessions, no pricing), Quarterly Meetups (4 sessions, no pricing). Package Total: 1,200,000 INR total, 600,000 INR offer, 50% overall discount.
